metadata.description: JRN estimation on rel-hm (H&M) dataset using LightGBM probes. Covers 2 tasks (user-churn classification, item-sales regression), 5 aggregation types, fan-out stratification, FK-shuffling decomposition, and JRN-guided architecture comparison. CRITICAL FIX: uses JRN = baseline_MAE / augmented_MAE for regression so JRN > 1 always means improvement.

examples.output: {"jrn": 0.905116, "baseline_score": 0.620946, "augmented_score": 0.562029, "baseline_std": 0.001485, "augmented_std": 0.001411, "higher_is_better": true, "jrn_direction_note": "JRN > 1 means join improves prediction (corrected for MAE)"}

examples.output: {"buckets": [{"bucket": "1-5", "lo": 1, "hi": 5, "midpoint": 3.0, "n_train": 3930, "n_val": 73, "baseline": 0.5492248062015505, "augmented": 0.5147286821705427, "jrn": 0.9371912491178546, "skipped": false}, {"bucket": "6-20", "lo": 6, "hi": 20, "midpoint": 13.0, "n_train": 3525, "n_val": 12, "baseline": 0.40625, "augmented": 0.2604166666666667, "jrn": 0.6410256410256411, "skipped": false}, {"bucket": "21-50", "n_train": 1950, "n_val": 1, "skipped": true}, {"bucket": "51-200", "n_train": 1265, "n_val": 0, "skipped": true}, {"bucket": "200+", "n_train": 80, "n_val": 0, "skipped": true}], "spearman_rho": null, "spearman_pval": null}
